# Usufruct Protocol SDK

> The official TypeScript SDK for the Usufruct Protocol — an on-chain rental market
> primitive for any Sui asset, priced in any payment coin. Always-liquid with
> handover protection, lazy state transitions, composable with any Sui protocol.
> Every object is its identity plus five verbs (nav · read · inspect · react ·
> write); reads are drift-zero (the deployed Move views); authority is possession.

For agents: load `llms-full.txt` for the complete self-contained payload (the docs
below, concatenated inline). The links here are the curated map.

## Start here

- [QUICKSTART](./QUICKSTART.md): install → a full rental lifecycle, step by step.
- [Testnet bootstrap](./concepts/testnet-bootstrap.md): a funded signer, an asset, a coin — zero to running.
- [API reference](./API.md): the complete public surface — every handle, verb, signature, return type.

## Concepts

- [API design](./concepts/api-design.md): the four pillars (drift-zero, object-centric, navigable, five verbs) and why possession is the role.
- [Write model](./concepts/write-model.md): the `Plan` write seam — `send` vs `build`, `batch`, sponsored/multisig signing.
- [Borrow](./concepts/borrow.md): composing code around the rented asset (the `Use` middle, the bracket, the by-value escape hatch).
- [Primitives](./concepts/primitives.md): the kernel layer the high-level composes from, and when to drop down.
- [Cookbook](./concepts/cookbook.md): complete, runnable recipes for the common tasks (rent, borrow, govern, collect, discover, batch).
- [FAQ](./concepts/faq.md): what the SDK does that intuition gets wrong (lazy state, per-tenure pricing, possession, coin-partitioned collect).

## What is Usufruct (the protocol)

- [Protocol repo](https://github.com/UsufructProtocol/usufruct-protocol-v1): the on-chain primitive itself; its `llms.txt` is an agent guide to *what Usufruct is* and the economics. This SDK doc set is the *how-to* over it.

## Design reference

- [ARCHITECTURE](./ARCHITECTURE.md): the four primitives and the drift-zero core / mirror seam.
- [SPEC](./SPEC.md): the authoritative design document.

## Examples

- [scripts/](./scripts): runnable, testnet-validated examples of every flow (rent, borrow, governor lifecycle, earnings, discovery, mint-to).

## Optional

- [CHANGELOG](./CHANGELOG.md): release history.
- [notes/design-notes.md](./notes/design-notes.md): the design & validation log (internal history).
